scripts.build: pnpm content:graph && astro build && pagefind --site dist
scripts.e2e:prepare: rm -rf dist-root dist-basepath node_modules/.astro-e2e-root node_modules/.astro-e2e-base && PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/ PUBLIC_ASTRO_CACHE_DIR=./node_modules/.astro-e2e-root pnpm exec astro build --force --outDir dist-root && pagefind --site dist-root && PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/da-studio/ PUBLIC_ASTRO_CACHE_DIR=./node_modules/.astro-e2e-base pnpm exec astro build --force --outDir dist-basepath && pagefind --site dist-basepath
scripts.verify:fast: pnpm content:validate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm content:validate && pnpm sources:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm e2e:ci
